LanguageData.VEF_ControlledBlinking.description: Override the creature's usual erratic blinking, allowing a directed way to blink to a chosen location within range.
LanguageData.VEF_ControlledBlinking.label: controlled blinking
LanguageData.VEF_ControlledDetonation.description: Willingly trigger a powerful self-destructive explosion, sacrificing this animal in a final act that unleashes all stored volatile compounds in a devastating blast.
LanguageData.VEF_ControlledDetonation.label: controlled detonation
LanguageData.VEF_ControlledInvisibility.description: Shroud the animal in a veil of controlled invisibility, vanishing from sight while retaining full awareness and precision.
LanguageData.VEF_ControlledInvisibility.label: controlled invisibility
LanguageData.VME_EnforceCompliance.description: Executes a colonist. Every colonist sharing the Commissar's ideoligion receives a positive mood bonus.
LanguageData.VME_EnforceCompliance.label: enforce compliance
LanguageData.VME_LeaderConversionRitual.description: Try to persuade someone to adopt your beliefs. If it goes well, they will lose some certainty in their ideoligion and may convert. If it backfires, they will gain certainty in their old beliefs.\n\nTo start this ritual at a specific place, select a ritual spot or matching altar/ideogram.
LanguageData.VME_LeaderConversionRitual.label: conversion ritual (leader)
LanguageData.VME_LeaderConvert.comps.0.failMessage: {INITIATOR_labelShort} failed to convert {RECIPIENT_labelShort}. {RECIPIENT_labelShort} was upset by the attempt, but {RECIPIENT_possessive} certainty fell from {CERTAINTYBEFORE} to {CERTAINTYAFTER}.
LanguageData.VME_LeaderConvert.description: Attempt to convert someone to the speaker's ideoligion. This will reduce the target's certainty in their own beliefs. The certainty reduction depends on the speaker's negotiation ability.
LanguageData.VME_LeaderConvert.label: convert (leader)
LanguageData.VME_LeaderCounsel.comps.0.failMessage: {INITIATOR_labelShort} botched the attempt to counsel {RECIPIENT_labelShort}. {RECIPIENT_labelShort} has become upset.
LanguageData.VME_LeaderCounsel.comps.0.successMessage: {INITIATOR_labelShort} successfully counselled {RECIPIENT_labelShort}, canceling the mood impact of {2}.
LanguageData.VME_LeaderCounsel.description: Offer counsel to a person to cancel the effect of a sad memory. The chance of success depends on the speaker's social skills and their relationship with the listener.
LanguageData.VME_LeaderCounsel.label: counsel (leader)
LanguageData.VME_LeaderPreachHealth.description: Preach moral strength to a sick or wounded person through the concepts of your ideology. This will improve their rate of wound healing and immunity gain.
LanguageData.VME_LeaderPreachHealth.label: preach health (leader)
LanguageData.VME_LeaderReassure.comps.0.successMessag: {INITIATOR_labelShort} has reassured {RECIPIENT_labelShort}, increasing {RECIPIENT_possessive} certainty in {IDEO} from {BEFORECERTAINTY} to {AFTERCERTAINTY}.
LanguageData.VME_LeaderReassure.description: Increase someone's certainty in their own beliefs. The regained certainty is based on the speaker's negotiation ability.
LanguageData.VME_LeaderReassure.label: reassure (leader)
LanguageData.VME_StrengthenFlame.description: An ability to ignite flame sources and cause an explosion. Only works on wild fires, not on man-made fire structures.
LanguageData.VME_StrengthenFlame.label: strengthen flame
LanguageData.VME_HarvestBodyParts.description: Harvests a fleshcrafted body part from a corpse.
LanguageData.VME_HarvestBodyParts.label: harvest body parts
LanguageData.VME_ConstructANest.description: Constructs an insectoid nest that produces insect jelly. A sucessful insectoid hymn ritual must be conducted to reduce the cooldown of this ability.
LanguageData.VME_ConstructANest.label: construct a nest
LanguageData.VME_TameInsectoid.description: Targets an insectoid creature and tames it instantly.
LanguageData.VME_TameInsectoid.label: tame insectoid
LanguageData.VME_WorkCommand.description: Instruct everyone around to work harder and be more diligent, boosting global work speed and the cost of depleting recreation. The effect remains attached to the caster for 24 hours.
LanguageData.VME_WorkCommand.label: work command
LanguageData.VME_EnableSelfDestruct.description: An ability to command a turret or mechanoid to self-destruct. The mechacker can target any turret, even enemy ones, as well as any mechanoid.
LanguageData.VME_EnableSelfDestruct.label: enable self-destruct
LanguageData.VME_MedicalEmergency.description: Stops the Nurse’s Rest, Recreation and Hunger from dropping for 12 hours. During this time, Nurse can only do Doctoring jobs properly.
LanguageData.VME_MedicalEmergency.label: medical emergency
LanguageData.VME_ThrowParty.label: throw party
LanguageData.VME_MakeADessert.description: Targets a meal to turn it into a dessert.
LanguageData.VME_MakeADessert.label: make a dessert
LanguageData.VME_CallTradeCaravan.label: call trade caravan
LanguageData.GR_AdrenalineRush.description: Causes the creature to move much faster for a while, at the cost of getting tired afterwards for almost half a day.
LanguageData.GR_AdrenalineRush.label: adrenaline rush
LanguageData.GR_Burrow.description: Sends the creature underground into burrowing mode, making it very resistant to damage for a while.
LanguageData.GR_Burrow.label: burrow underground
LanguageData.GR_CatReflexes.description: Makes the creature much more agile, improving its chance to dodge melee attacks even further.
LanguageData.GR_CatReflexes.label: cat reflexes
LanguageData.GR_ChemfuelDischarge.description: Remotely detonate the chemfuel reservoirs of this creature. The animal will be affected and damaged by the resulting explosion.
LanguageData.GR_ChemfuelDischarge.label: chemfuel discharge
LanguageData.GR_DeathRay.description: Redirects an orbital mechanoid satellite to fire upon a selected location.
LanguageData.GR_DeathRay.label: orbital heat ray
LanguageData.GR_DetonateAcid.description: Remotely detonate the acidic chemfuel reservoirs of this creature. The animal will be affected and damaged by the resulting explosion.
LanguageData.GR_DetonateAcid.label: detonate acidic chemfuel
LanguageData.GR_DetonateBomb.description: Remotely detonate the chemfuel reservoirs of this creature. The animal will be affected and damaged by the resulting explosion.
LanguageData.GR_DetonateBomb.label: detonate chemfuel
LanguageData.GR_DetonateFrost.description: Remotely detonate the cryo chemfuel reservoirs of this creature. The animal will be affected and damaged by the resulting explosion.
LanguageData.GR_DetonateFrost.label: detonate cryo chemfuel
LanguageData.GR_DetonatePoison.description: Remotely detonate the venomous chemfuel reservoirs of this creature. The animal will be affected and damaged by the resulting explosion.
LanguageData.GR_DetonatePoison.label: detonate venomous chemfuel
LanguageData.GR_DetonateStun.description: Remotely detonate the stunning chemfuel reservoirs of this creature. The animal will be affected and damaged by the resulting explosion.
LanguageData.GR_DetonateStun.label: detonate stunning chemfuel
LanguageData.GR_FragEggs.description: Lay several exploding eggs. The animal will be affected and damaged by the resulting explosion.
LanguageData.GR_FragEggs.label: lay frag eggs
LanguageData.GR_InsectClouds.description: Spawns a cloud of drones surrounding this animal that will cut apart any creature, excluding all insectoid paragons.
LanguageData.GR_InsectClouds.label: insect clouds
LanguageData.GR_KeenSenses.description: Makes the creature more aware of its surroundings, increasing its melee capacities (affects sight, hit chance and consciousness)
LanguageData.GR_KeenSenses.label: keen senses
LanguageData.GR_PackTactics.description: Collaborate with other nearby muffalowolves to bring down prey.
LanguageData.GR_PackTactics.label: pack tactics
LanguageData.GR_PoisonousCloud.description: Releases a cloud of poisonous gas from this creature. The animal will NOT be affected and damaged by it.
LanguageData.GR_PoisonousCloud.label: release venomous cloud
LanguageData.GR_ResearchDrive.description: Offer investigative insights to nearby researches, allowing them to more easily reach a breakthrough.\n\n<color=#E5E54C>Gameplay effect:</color> "My fellow scientist, have you considered rejecting humanity, and returning to monkey? Food for thought".
LanguageData.GR_ResearchDrive.label: research drive
LanguageData.GR_SetTrap.description: Sets an explosive trap. The Manalope won't trigger it.
LanguageData.GR_SetTrap.label: set chemfuel trap
LanguageData.GR_StampedeClouds.description: Stampedes, moving faster and creating dust clouds that block line of view for projectile weapons. Gets the creature tired after a while.
LanguageData.GR_StampedeClouds.label: stampede
LanguageData.GR_VentHeatedExhaust.description: Vents the heated gasses produced by this mechanoid hybrid's internal processes. This creates a wave of superheated ait that will affect the surrounding tiles. It will not affect the hybrid.
LanguageData.GR_VentHeatedExhaust.label: vent heated exhaust
LanguageData.AA_Bullet_TinyVenomBarb.description: Fire a shower of small but deadly venomous barbs that pierce skin and deliver a potent toxin, weakening targets over time.
LanguageData.AA_Bullet_TinyVenomBarb.label: tiny venomous barbs
LanguageData.AA_ExplodingWeb.description: Throw a web of sticky silk that can stun its target and explode violently.
LanguageData.AA_ExplodingWeb.label: exploding web
LanguageData.AA_HugeQuill.description: Launch a massive quill tipped with barbs that embeds deeply, causing severe pain and making removal agonizingly difficult.
LanguageData.AA_HugeQuill.label: huge quill
LanguageData.RB_Quill.description: Fire a shower of small but deadly venomous barbs that pierce skin and deliver a potent toxin, weakening targets over time.
LanguageData.RB_Quill.label: ranged quill
LanguageData.GR_DetonatePsionic.description: Remotely detonate the psionic chemfuel reservoirs of this creature. The animal will be affected and damaged by the resulting explosion.
LanguageData.GR_DetonatePsionic.label: detonate psionic
LanguageData.GR_InsanityCloud.description: Invokes the insanity of That Which Man Is Not Meant to Know
LanguageData.GR_InsanityCloud.label: invoke insanity
LanguageData.GR_Stamina.description: Makes the creature more resistant to damage for a while.
LanguageData.GR_Stamina.label: greater stamina
LanguageData.GR_CryoBlast.description: Unleash a cryo blast that erupts in a wave of freezing energy, slowing movement and encasing targets in layers of frost.
LanguageData.GR_CryoBlast.label: cryo cannon
LanguageData.GR_Disintegrator.description: Fire a focused beam of energy that destabilizes matter at the molecular level, disintegrating flesh, armor, and cover in a flash of searing light.
LanguageData.GR_Disintegrator.label: disintegrator
LanguageData.GR_Distortion.description: Warp space around the target, creating a distortion that disrupts movement and fractures reality in a chaotic burst.
LanguageData.GR_Distortion.label: spatial distortion
LanguageData.GR_FireSpit.description: Spit a glob of volatile chemfuel that sticks to surfaces and ignites on impact, engulfing the area in explosive flames.
LanguageData.GR_FireSpit.label: chemfuel spit
LanguageData.GR_FlameBreathAnimated.description: Exhale a cone of superheated flame that ignites flammable objects and scorches anything caught in its path.
LanguageData.GR_FlameBreathAnimated.label: flame breath
LanguageData.GR_HairballProjectile.description: Spit a glob of blinding fluid that bursts on impact, releasing a flash of caustic light that disorients and obscures vision.
LanguageData.GR_HairballProjectile.label: blinding spit
LanguageData.GR_IncendiaryMote.description: Unleash a torrent of ignited chemfuel in a wide arc, engulfing enemies in roaring flames and leaving a trail of burning destruction.
LanguageData.GR_IncendiaryMote.label: chemfuel flamethrower
LanguageData.GR_Laser.description: Unleash a burst of twin-coiled laser beams that spiral together, cutting through targets with intense, synchronized precision.
LanguageData.GR_Laser.label: twin-coiled laser
LanguageData.GR_PlasmaBurst.description: Release a concentrated burst of superheated plasma that vaporizes armor and scorches everything in its path.
LanguageData.GR_PlasmaBurst.label: plasma burst
LanguageData.GR_PoisonBlast.description: Detonate a toxic projectile that releases a burst of poisonous gas, contaminating the area and weakening all who inhale it.
LanguageData.GR_PoisonBlast.label: poison blast
LanguageData.GR_PoisonBreathAnimated.description: Exhale a noxious cloud of poison that lingers in the air, seeping into lungs and weakening all caught within its reach.
LanguageData.GR_PoisonBreathAnimated.label: poison breath
LanguageData.GR_Proj_ThrownSac.description: Hurl a volatile explosive sac that bursts on impact, unleashing a fiery blast and scattering shrapnel in all directions.
LanguageData.GR_Proj_ThrownSac.label: explosive sac
LanguageData.GR_RazorProjectile.description: Launch a bladed, detachable tail in a deadly arc, striking from range with razor-sharp precision before being reconstructed again.
LanguageData.GR_RazorProjectile.label: razor tail
LanguageData.GR_SmokeBomb.description: Fire a large smoke-filled projectile that bursts on impact, releasing a thick cloud that obscures vision and disrupts targeting.
LanguageData.GR_SmokeBomb.label: smoke cannon
LanguageData.GR_SniperFlechette.description: Fire a high-velocity flechette with pinpoint accuracy, designed to pierce armor and strike vital organs from extreme range.
LanguageData.GR_SniperFlechette.label: sniper flechette
LanguageData.GR_StunBolt.description: Fire a crackling stun bolt that overloads nervous systems on impact, temporarily paralyzing targets with a jolt of energy.
LanguageData.GR_StunBolt.label: stun bolt
LanguageData.GR_Warhead.description: Fire a massive anti-grain warhead that delivers a catastrophic explosion, obliterating everything in its blast radius with overwhelming force.
LanguageData.GR_Warhead.label: antigrain artillery
LanguageData.GR_Web.description: Throw a web of sticky silk that can stun its target.
LanguageData.GR_Web.label: web
LanguageData.VFEE_BestowAcolyte.description: Bestows the Acolyte title on a selected pawn. That pawn now has 13 honor. Can’t be cast on a pawn that’s already a Acolyte or higher. Has a 3 day cooldown.
LanguageData.VFEE_BestowAcolyte.label: bestow: acolyte
LanguageData.VFEE_BestowBaron.description: Bestows the Baron/Baroness title on a selected pawn. That pawn now has 45 honor. Can’t be cast on a pawn that’s already a Baron/Baroness or higher. Has a 3 day cooldown.
LanguageData.VFEE_BestowBaron.label: bestow: baron
LanguageData.VFEE_BestowCount.description: Bestows the Count/Countess title on a selected pawn. That pawn now has 45 honor. Can’t be cast on a pawn that’s already a Count/Countess or higher. Has a 3 day cooldown.
LanguageData.VFEE_BestowCount.label: bestow: count
LanguageData.VFEE_BestowFreeholder.description: Bestows the Freeholder title on a selected pawn. That pawn receives 1 Honor. Can’t be cast on a pawn that’s already a Freeholder or higher. Has a 3 day cooldown.
LanguageData.VFEE_BestowFreeholder.label: bestow: freeholder
LanguageData.VFEE_BestowKnight.description: Bestows the Knight/Dame title on a selected pawn. That pawn now has 21 honor. Can’t be cast on a pawn that’s already a Knight/Dame or higher. Has a 3 day cooldown.
LanguageData.VFEE_BestowKnight.label: bestow: knight
LanguageData.VFEE_BestowPraetor.description: Bestows the Praetor title on a selected pawn. That pawn now has 31 honor. Can’t be cast on a pawn that’s already a Praetor or higher. Has a 3 day cooldown.
LanguageData.VFEE_BestowPraetor.label: bestow: praetor
LanguageData.VFEE_BestowYeoman.description: Bestows the Yeoman title on a selected pawn. That pawn now has 7 honor. Can’t be cast on a pawn that’s already a Yeoman or higher. Has a 3 day cooldown.
LanguageData.VFEE_BestowYeoman.label: bestow: yeoman
LanguageData.VFEE_RoyalAddress.description: is giving a royal address from the throne.If all goes well, every titled participant will gain a small amount of honor, and they will gain honor for each titled participant. If it goes poorly, the speech will do social damage and will lose honor for each titled participant. The outcome depends on their social abilities. Imperial nobility currently residing in the area will join the speech and count as titled participants.
LanguageData.VFEE_RoyalAddress.label: royal address
LanguageData.VRE_AnimalFeed.description: Bite the target animal and extract hemogen directly from their blood. The animal will lose blood and will be horrified by the interaction, which can result in it lashing out. A fast-acting coagulant will seal the wound to prevent bleeding.\n\nCan only target animals.
LanguageData.VRE_AnimalFeed.label: animalfeed
LanguageData.VRE_CorpseFeed.description: Bite the target corpse and extract hemogen directly from their blood. The corpse will lose any remaining blood.\n\nCan only target human corpses.
LanguageData.VRE_CorpseFeed.label: corpsefeed
LanguageData.VRE_Ecstasy.description: Grant a target a feeling of extreme ecstasy for a brief duration, which makes them fall head over heels with the caster.
LanguageData.VRE_Ecstasy.label: ecstasy
LanguageData.VRE_FilterInfection.description: Lay hands on a target and help the target battle their infections. Works on animals or humans.
LanguageData.VRE_FilterInfection.label: filter infection
LanguageData.VRE_HeartCrush.description: Rip out the heart of an enemy in close proximity, instantly killing them and covering the area in blood. Will only work on creatures with body size of 2 or lower. Bigger creatures will still be heavily damaged.
LanguageData.VRE_HeartCrush.label: heart crush
LanguageData.VRE_Hemosmosis.description: Suck blood filth from the area around the sanguophage and turn it into hemogen.
LanguageData.VRE_Hemosmosis.label: hemosmosis
LanguageData.VRE_Resurrect.description: Use archites in the bloodstream to infuse a corpse's body with new life, repairing degenerated cell structures and kickstarting vital functions. The older and worse-preserved the corpse is, the more likely it is that they will come back with memory loss or health conditions. This ability seems to exhaust the archites somehow, so it can only be used very rarely.
LanguageData.VRE_Resurrect.label: resurrect
LanguageData.VRE_SanguoFeed.description: Bite the target and extract hemogen directly from their blood. The target will lose blood and will be insulted by the interaction, but will be otherwise unharmed. A fast-acting coagulant will seal the wound to prevent bleeding.\n\nCan only target hemogenic humans.
LanguageData.VRE_SanguoFeed.label: sanguofeed
LanguageData.VRE_ToxicCloud.description: Excrete a thick toxic smoke from special organic reservoirs in the lungs. Tox gas is deadly to almost every creature.
LanguageData.VRE_ToxicCloud.label: toxic cloud
LanguageData.VRE_ViscuousGoo.description: Eject a projectile that explodes on impact and creates a large amount of filth that greatly slows down people trying to move through it.
LanguageData.VRE_ViscuousGoo.label: viscuous goo
LanguageData.VRE_AcidSpray_SingleUse.description: Spray a sticky acid substance from glands in the neck up through the mouth and all over the target area. The acid will stick to targets and burn them.
LanguageData.VRE_AcidSpray_SingleUse.label: acid spray
LanguageData.VRE_Coagulate_SingleUse.description: Use special glands in the wrists to quickly tend someone's wounds.
LanguageData.VRE_Coagulate_SingleUse.label: coagulate
LanguageData.VRE_Ecstasy_SingleUse.description: Grant a target a feeling of extreme ecstasy for a brief duration, which makes them fall head over heels with the caster.
LanguageData.VRE_Ecstasy_SingleUse.label: ecstasy
LanguageData.VRE_FilterInfection_SingleUse.descriptio: Lay hands on a target and help the target battle their infections. Works on animals or humans.
LanguageData.VRE_FilterInfection_SingleUse.label: filter infection
LanguageData.VRE_HeartCrush_SingleUse.description: Rip out the heart of an enemy in close proximity, instantly killing them and covering the area in blood. Will only work on creatures with body size of 2 or lower. Bigger creatures will still be heavily damaged.
LanguageData.VRE_HeartCrush_SingleUse.label: heart crush
LanguageData.VRE_Hemosmosis_SingleUse.description: Suck blood filth from the area around the sanguophage and turn it into hemogen.
LanguageData.VRE_Hemosmosis_SingleUse.label: hemosmosis
LanguageData.VRE_PiercingSpine_SingleUse.description: Use a hemogenic chemical reaction to launch a bony spine at the target. The spine exits through the skin from an opening between the collarbones. Given the method of launch, it is surprisingly easy to aim.
LanguageData.VRE_PiercingSpine_SingleUse.label: piercing spine
LanguageData.VRE_ToxicCloud_SingleUse.description: Excrete a thick toxic smoke from special organic reservoirs in the lungs. Tox gas is deadly to almost every creature.
LanguageData.VRE_ToxicCloud_SingleUse.label: toxic cloud
LanguageData.VRE_ViscuousGoo_SingleUse.description: Eject a projectile that explodes on impact and creates a large amount of filth that greatly slows down people trying to move through it.
LanguageData.VRE_ViscuousGoo_SingleUse.label: viscuous goo
LanguageData.VQE_CraftAnARCComponent.description: Try and turn an advanced component into an ARC component. There is an equal chance that it will turn an advanced component into an ARC component, or an industrial component.
LanguageData.VQE_CraftAnARCComponent.label: craft an ARC component
LanguageData.VGE_AnalyzeTheStars.description: Use a telescope to analyze the stars to detect a new orbital location nearby.
LanguageData.VGE_AnalyzeTheStars.label: analyze the stars
LanguageData.VGE_EmergencyLaunch.description: Use the piloting console to trigger an immediate emergency launch, landing in a random nearby location with a guaranteed mishap happening. Anyone outside of the gravship will be left behind.
LanguageData.VGE_EmergencyLaunch.label: emergency launch
LanguageData.VGE_EngineeringCommand.description: Offer guidance on maintenance and gravship construction efforts, boosting construction and maintenance abilities for everyone nearby. The effect remains attached to the caster for 24 hours.
LanguageData.VGE_EngineeringCommand.label: engineering command
LanguageData.VQEA_EMPPulse.description: Release a powerful electromagnetic pulse, damaging all electronics in radius. If used outside, lightning strikes may hit the area around the caster.
LanguageData.VQEA_EMPPulse.label: electromagnetic pulse
LanguageData.VQEA_HellsphereBlast.description: Unleash a concentrated beam of destructive energy from the eyes, identical to the blast fired by a hellsphere cannon. After a short duration, the microscoping skipgates in the eyes release a searing pulse of power capable of melting concrete and incinerating anything within the blast zone.
LanguageData.VQEA_HellsphereBlast.label: hellsphere blast
LanguageData.VQEA_InfernoSpew.description: Expel a dense jet of sticky, flammable bile from the mouth. Upon contact, it can ignite targets and leave behind burning puddles on the ground. The bile is produced and stored in a specialized gland in the neck, paired with a separate chamber containing a hypergolic compound used for ignition.
LanguageData.VQEA_InfernoSpew.label: inferno spew
LanguageData.VQEA_Invisibility.description: Use psychic suggestion to turn yourself invisible for a short duration.
LanguageData.VQEA_Invisibility.label: invisibility
LanguageData.VQEA_Levitation.description: Use a delicate psychic field to levitate to the target location.
LanguageData.VQEA_Levitation.label: levitation
LanguageData.VQEA_Levitation.verbProperties.label: levitation
LanguageData.VQEA_MatterPhasing.description: The colonist briefly shifts into an intangible state, letting them pass through walls before becoming solid again.
LanguageData.VQEA_MatterPhasing.label: matter phasing
